Skin-tight stealth suit in shifting smoke patterns. Ornate but minimal armor accents in antiqued silver. Form-fitted with decorative sonic-dampening vanes. Assassin's elegance worth fortunes.

Deep plum officer's uniform with ornate rose-gold threading throughout fabric. Armored sections decorated with service achievements. Form-tailored perfection with ceremonial energy blade in jeweled scabbard.

Sage green reinforced coveralls with decorative tool harness featuring custom laser-etched implements. Welding visor etched with engineering poetry. Form-fitted through waist with rolled sleeves over armored mesh.

Ceremonial sunrise-gold armor with every centimeter covered in relief sculptures depicting exploration history. Decorative photon lance. Radiant polish. Form-hugging parade armor remaining fully combat-capable.
Scavenger masterpiece—bronze chest from transport rig, violet arms from racer gear, pearl legs from medical bay, all form-fitted through custom tailoring. Trophy cables with salvaged honors.

Translucent rose nano-fiber revealing reactive underlayer's glowing patterns. Floating gunmetal armor pieces magnetically suspended at strategic points. Form-hugging experimental suit combining beauty with cutting-edge technology.

Hammered iron segmented plates over crimson smart-fabric. Ornate engravings cover every surface with tactical poetry. Flowing half-cape from left shoulder. Warrior-scholar's form-fitted battle literature.

Cream suit with breathing apparatus decorated like carved ceramic art. Bronze tubing traces functional and aesthetic paths along curves. Hazardous environment operations elevated to wearable masterwork.
Battle-worn durasteel painted midnight blue with amber power veins. Heavy left pauldron contrasts sleek form-fitted right side and waist. Damage patterns preserved as decorative honor testimony.

Holographic polymer shifting through oil-slick rainbow patterns. Minimal jade ceramic accents. Neural ports with decorative amethyst housings. Form-hugging tech-infiltrator masterwork for shadow operatives.
Burgundy carbon-fiber with ornate copper buckle cascade down spine. Magnetic thigh mounts featuring etched fleet heraldry. Form-fitted tactical precision with decorative engineering throughout.

Brushed steel armor with rust-orange visible at articulation gaps. Navigation charts laser-etched across every plate. Heavy gauntlets balance form-fitted torso construction. Pathfinder's metallic testament.

Scarlet pilot suit with silver decorative tubing spiraling limbs like elegant technical spirals. Visor frame features ornate heads-up sensor array. Squadron commander rig form-fitted for performance excellence.
